feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: about goods receving and invoice processing
entry.content:
Hello, I"m Hansol"s Jeong Yeonjae.
I"m inquiring about goods receving and invoice processing.
The amount is calculated by quantity * unit price, and when it is received, the first decimal place must be 6 or higher, and when the invoice is processed, the first decimal place must be 5 or higher.
Is there anything to modify regarding SAP setting?
Invoice processing is done by mrer.
Please check.
Thank you.

entry.title: While creating payment proposal getting error message as BTE 00001820 is active (see long text)
entry.content:
We are getting error message as BTE 00001820 is active (see long text) with Message no. FZ396, its not allowing for payment.

 

Here documents are consisting with one invoice and one vendor credit memo

entry.title: Certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
I am reaching out to request official information regarding the compatibility and certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0 Enhancement Package 5 (EHP5) running on a Microsoft SQL Server database.

 

We have reviewed the SAP HANA certified hardware catalog, but it appears to focus primarily on SAP HANA rather than traditional databases like MS SQL.HPE documentation mentions support for SAP HANA with similar MSA models, but there is no clear reference to SAP ERP on MS SQL.

 

 

 

To assist us in making an informed decision, could you please provide clarification on the following points:

  1. Is the HPE MSA 2070 storage system certified for use with SAP ERP 6.0 EHP5 on MS SQL?
  2. If certified, could you kindly provide a link to the official documentation or certification page where this is detailed?
  3. If not certified, can you recommend alternative HPE storage systems that are officially certified for this configuration?
  4. Are there any specific configuration requirements or recommendations for HPE storage systems when used with SAP ERP on MS SQL?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IDoc: Reduced Messagetype ZEWMDEBMAS not relevant for reduction
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

when I try to edit the reduced message type ZEWMDEBMAS in transaction BD53, I receive the error message: "Message type ZEWMDEBMAS is not relevant for reduction."


Why do I receive this message?

entry.title: Multiple PO's created with 0 price for same PR
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

One of the buyers clicked on the save button multiple times in S4HANA SSP, which caused the system to create a new PO for the same PR but with a 0 price, and it went to the supplier. How can we stop this behaviour so that once the PO is created for the full value, the system shouldn't allow duplicate PO's for the same PR, even buyer by mistake clicks on the save button. 

Thanks in advance.

Gaurav

entry.title: Tracking URL
entry.content:
Hi, would anybody know how to return Tracking Info using oData or Webservice ?

I can't seem to find it anywhere in OutBoundDelivery root

 

Regards,

Mark

entry.title: SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026
entry.content:
Hi All, could you please let me know below requirement would be addressed by HRSP Yearend update or it requires any configuration 

SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026 

Beginning on January 1, 2026, employees who earned over $145,000 from the previous calendar year (in 2025), will have to make 401(k) Catch-up contributions into a Roth account, meaning all contributions need to be made on a post-tax basis.  The $145,000 in earnings should be based on FICA Wages.

 

The 401(k) mandatory post-tax catch-up contributions will only affect employees that meet these two main requirements:

  1. Have earned more than $145,000 in the previous calendar year (2025), and
  2. Be 50 years of age or older.

 

If an employee meets the two criteria above, then all catch-up contributions will need to be made as Roth contributions/after-tax basis. All other employees that do NOT meet these two requirements, will be exempt from the Roth contribution requirement.

entry.title: Error in establishing IDoc connection between SAP CPI and S/4HANA
entry.content:
We are currently trying to establish a connection between SAP CPI and S/4HANA using the IDoc adapter. Our system currently only uses OData, and we wanted to explore more options in connectivity.

To start our project, we are trying to send a sales order from SAP CPI to S4. The IDoc is ORDERS05, in XML format and the structure is correct. See below:

<ORDERS05>
	<IDOC BEGIN="1">
		<EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
			<TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
			<MANDT>120</MANDT>
			<DOCNUM></DOCNUM>
			<DOCREL>755</DOCREL>
			<STATUS>53</STATUS>
			<DIRECT>2</DIRECT>
			<OUTMOD/>
			<IDOCTYP>ORDERS05</IDOCTYP>
			<MESTYP>ORDERS</MESTYP>
			<SNDPOR>CPIDEV</SNDPOR>
			<SNDPRT>KU</SNDPRT>
			<SNDPRN>C000003</SNDPRN>
			<RCVPOR>SAPDS4</RCVPOR>
			<RCVPRT>KU</RCVPRT>
			<RCVPRN>C000003</RCVPRN>
			<CREDAT>20250402</CREDAT>
			<CRETIM>090303</CRETIM>
		</EDI_DC40>
		<E1EDK01>
			<ACTION>00</ACTION>
			<BSART>DS</BSART>
			<BELNR>30114186</BELNR>
		</E1EDK01>
		<E1EDK14>
			<QUALF>019</QUALF>
			<ORGID>ZEDI</ORGID>
		</E1EDK14>
		<E1EDK03>
			<IDDAT>010</IDDAT>
			<DATUM>20250402</DATUM>
		</E1EDK03>
		<E1EDK03>
			<IDDAT>002</IDDAT>
			<DATUM>20250403</DATUM>
		</E1EDK03>
		<E1EDKA1>
			<PARVW>WE</PARVW>
			<NAME1>MXXX KXXX</NAME1>
			<STRAS>000 RXXXX</STRAS>
			<ORT01>FXXXXX LXXXX</ORT01>
			<PSTLZ>00000</PSTLZ>
			<TELF1>000-000-0000</TELF1>
			<REGIO>NJ</REGIO>
		</E1EDKA1>
		<E1EDKA1>
			<PARVW>AG</PARVW>
			<LIFNR>93906NPAW</LIFNR>
		</E1EDKA1>
		<E1EDK02>
			<QUALF>001</QUALF>
			<BELNR>30114186</BELNR>
			<DATUM>20250402</DATUM>
		</E1EDK02>
		<E1EDK17>
			<QUALF>Z01</QUALF>
			<LKOND>CG</LKOND>
		</E1EDK17>
		<E1EDKT1>
			<TDID>ZEDH</TDID>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>IA|93906</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>SL|CG</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>VN|93906</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>ST|NPAW</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>BT|NPAW</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
		</E1EDKT1>
		<E1EDKT1>
			<TDID>ZSCH</TDID>
			<E1EDKT2>
				<TDLINE>:C000::003</TDLINE>
				<TDFORMAT>/</TDFORMAT>
			</E1EDKT2>
		</E1EDKT1>
		<E1EDP01>
			<POSEX>1</POSEX>
			<MENGE>2</MENGE>
			<MENEE>EA</MENEE>
			<VPREI>112.2</VPREI>
			<E1EDP19>
				<QUALF>003</QUALF>
				<IDTNR>806134977252</IDTNR>
			</E1EDP19>
			<E1EDP19>
				<QUALF>001</QUALF>
				<IDTNR>4645188</IDTNR>
			</E1EDP19>
			<E1EDP19>
				<QUALF>002</QUALF>
				<IDTNR>H981101-AGB</IDTNR>
			</E1EDP19>
		</E1EDP01>
		<E1EDS01>
			<SUMID>001</SUMID>
			<SUMME>1</SUMME>
			<SUNIT>EA</SUNIT>
		</E1EDS01>
	</IDOC>
</ORDERS05>

Before trying to send this file, we have done the basics such as activate IDoc via SICF, creating an RFC connection in SM59, registering the IDoc service in SRTIDoc, we added the IDoc URL resource path (sap/bc/srt/idoc) in SAP Cloud Connector. We also created a new port via WE21. We followed this blog: SAP CPI to SAP ERP and SAP ERP to SAP CPI and did every step.

However, when we tried to send the file, we got this error in SAP CPI Monitoring:

I checked error logs via SRT_ELOG in S4, and got the same error:

We cannot find any blog or SAP note that could help us. Is there anyone who experienced this and how were you able to fix it?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Message No. 00058
entry.content:
Hi,

Entry APOH   does not exist in T001K (check entry)

Message No. 00058

I have created material type APOH . But when I am goint to check via mm01 that timei am facing the issue .

Please tell me , how Can I solve this error in SAP MM

entry.title: Employee role(BUP003) in BP is not showing in dropdown
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am unable to find BUP003 Employee Role in the dropdown when I try to create a BP.

After reading technical material, I have done:

1. SM30: T77S0 Table

2. Activation Switch for Functions of BP

3. Define Number Ranges for BP

4. Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges

5. Define Account Groups and Field Selection (Supplier)

6. Define Number Ranges for Supplier Master Records

7. Set BP Role Category for Direction BP to Vendor

8. Define Number Assignment for Direction BP to Vendor

9. Define Reconciliation Accounts for Employees in Role FI Supplier

10. Define Default Vendor Data for Employees in Role FI Supplier

11. SE38: /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE

12. SLG1: Got the message "Pernr 00000003 successfully synched into Business Partner."

But I still haven't found the BUP003 in dropdown when do BP again. Does anyone know which of the steps I missed or did wrong in the above steps?

Thanks 

Vincent

entry.title: How to administrate change documents?
entry.content:
The below Change Document data needs to be retained/archived:

User Change Data:

  • Change history for logon data - USH02
  • Change history for authorizations - USH04
  • Change history for authorization profiles - USH10
  • Change history for authorization values - USH12

 

Role Change Data:

  • CDHDR
  • CDPOS


Kindly advise on how the data can be transferred as CDHDR, CDPOS also contains Change logs from another table as well.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transfer of CO Plan Data to BCS using WBS Element as source
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

I want to ask that I have encounter an issue when use FMCYCOPI_CO - Plan Data Transfer from CO in BCS FM.

In this T-Code, I use the project definition field as source. The system can be executed successfully both in test run and update run but there is no data display in the result screen. Which is strange because it should be not successful.

 I tried for other source which Cost Center and Cost Element and the system can be executed successfully both in test run and update run, also there are data display in the result screen. 

My Question are:
1. How to execute FMCYCOPI_CO use Project definition as source and is capable of retrieving the processed data during the system's result screen display?
2. Can I use WBS Element as source? If yes, how to show that field on the FMCYCOPI_CO T-Code screen? Because i only can use Cost Center, Internal Order, Project Definition, Business Process, Cost Element.

Thank you for your help,
Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: sm37 "File transfer failed!" and "ERROR_MESSAGE: The job was cancelled after a system exception."
entry.content:
Hello,
In SM37 background job , I’m receiving the following errors:
"File transfer failed!" and
"ERROR_MESSAGE: The job was cancelled after a system exception."

When I run the program in the background, I expect a text file to be generated in SM37 and in the spool, but it is not being created.
There is no dump generated.
The AL11 directory is correct.

entry.title: SLED being populated automatically (LQUA VFDAT )
entry.content:
We have some materials for which we maintain the minimum remaining shelf life in the material master. At the time of GR, system prompts the user to enter the  SLED date. This is carried forward to the WM transfer order and stored in LQUA-VFDAT field.

However, in SOME CASES, system is automatically populating the SLED in WM (LQUA VFDAT). The date seems to be the last GR date for the quant, even though the GR document field is in fact populated with a WM transfer order number. (since it is a bin to bin move and does not have a GR number to go back to.)

It is not in all movements. I am unable to figure out why and how this date is being populated.

I highly appreciate any insights you can provide. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SLAW Consolidation
entry.content:
Hi, 

When consolidating USMM files in SLAW - If you have a system with two production clients, which mark it as "not relevant" for the consolidation, is there any solution to make it "relevant"?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to send control recipe to CPI (Cloud Platform Integration)
entry.content:
Hi

We want to send process order data from SAP to our MES system via CPI. But the RFC destination has to be a type T - TCP/IP connection. We otherwise use type G for all communication to CPI. We do not have an RFC listener.

How do we proceed from here?

entry.title: S4 HANA instance for presonal use
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I'm a functional resource with 6 years of P2P experience. To develop my skillset, particularly configuration, I would like to access the full ERP suite S4 HANA (Cloud edition) for personal/training use. What are the available options for someone with their own LLC, Learning Hub account and $100/month budget?

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: Masking the PII data in S/4
entry.content:
Dear All

I want to mask the address data of customer whose sales order is greater than 30 years old. This is required every where  PII data exist for such customer. How this can be enabled and does it require any additional license.

 

Regards,

Neeraj Srivastava

entry.title: Stock transfer from non SLED to SLED material
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

Can you please help me with this inquiry?

We have old materials without batch management and are now in the process of creating new materials by copy.

The new materials are configured with batch management. The "PR/PO/GR" works great, the batch is created. No problems there.

The warehouse user asked if it was possible to transfer the stock from the old materials to the new ones with batch management. I tried to transfer the stock via MIGO (mvt 309), and although I filled the field "DateofManufact. TrPg", the system deletes the date and returns the error "Enter the date of production".

Is it something i'm missing or SAP doesn't allow this transfer?

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Unable to Display Physically Deleted WBS Elements
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

Certain WBS elements were physically deleted (not just flagged for deletion), and we have noticed that the flagging option (logical deletion) was disabled at the time. As a result, these elements do not appear in the PRPS table.

We are now in a situation where we would like to reuse the same WBS codes that were used by the deleted elements. However, since they were physically deleted, we are unable to retrieve or confirm their previous existence 

Looking forward for your help.

Mohamed El Amine AOURAGH
